title: Cookies for AppleSkin!
description: VanillaTweaks Cookies compatibility for the AppleSkin mod!
body:
<iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube-nocookie.com/embed/mHo8eI5Pv_c" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" allowfullscreen></iframe>

Makes the Cookies from the [Vanilla Tweaks](https://vanillatweaks.net/) Resource Pack compatible with the [AppleSkin](https://modrinth.com/mod/appleskin) Mod.
That's it. There's not much else to say.
I hope you enjoy! :D
